ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the car (e.g., usa, europe, japan) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the car (e.g., old, new, hybrid) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the car was manufactured */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel, rear-wheel, all-wheel) */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the car (e.g., sedan, SUV, coupe) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car (e.g., chevrolet, buick) */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year production started */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year production ended */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation of the model (e.g., 1st gen, 2nd gen) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the engine belongs to */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement of the engine in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "engine_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the engine */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V8, inline-4) */,
  "fuel_system" TEXT /* Fuel system used (e.g., carburetor, fuel injection) */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  "bore" REAL /* Bore of the engine in millimeters */,
  "stroke" REAL /* Stroke of the engine in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the performance record belongs to */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (mpg) of the car */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the car in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the car */,
  "acceleration_unit" TEXT /* Unit of acceleration (e.g., seconds, minutes) */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the car in miles per hour */,
  "quarter_mile_time" REAL /* Time to complete a quarter mile in seconds */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance in feet */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  "emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard (e.g., Euro 6, EPA Tier 2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., usa, europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the car is made (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the car is made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., old, new, hybrid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the car type (e.g., passenger, commercial) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the car type (e.g., compact, luxury) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the car was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "decade" TEXT /* Decade of the year (e.g., 1970s, 1980s) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the make (e.g., chevrolet, buick) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the make */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the make was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models_relation" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* ID of the make the model belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_relation_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines_relation" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the engine belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_relation" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the performance metric belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, development) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., senior researcher, junior analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the user accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
